response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software craftsmanship and architectural abilities across diverse technologies, they lack the core required qualifications for this role. Their Java experience ended 7+ years ago and is superficial (robotic arms work), with no Kotlin experience whatsoever. Critically, there is no evidence of Spring ecosystem expertise, enterprise framework knowledge (Hibernate, Quarkus), or IDE/language tooling experience. Their current trajectory (TypeScript/Node.js/AI infrastructure) and broader full-stack generalism move away from the deep JVM specialization this Senior IC role demands.
strengths: Demonstrated mastery of software craftsmanship principles, testing methodologies, and architectural design across complex, large-scale systems
Proven ability to take end-to-end ownership of features and subsystems from design through implementation
Strong track record of learning diverse technologies and contributing effectively to multiple technical domains
concerns: Java experience is 7+ years old and limited to robotic arms; current work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js, not JVM technologies
No Kotlin experience, no Spring ecosystem expertise, and no mention of enterprise Java frameworks (Hibernate, Quarkus, application servers)
No IDE or language tooling experience; closest was NI LabWindows/CVI over 10 years ago; current work is web/AI infrastructure, not developer tools

key_factors.factor: No IDE or language tooling experience
Strong architecture and software craftsmanship skills
